personas.name: News Curator
personas.description: Creator of content - Gathers news, assigns avatars, and generates AI-led video briefings.

personas.name: News User (aka Reactor)
personas.description: The user interacting with the system - Watches the news briefing and can ask for more information.

flows.flow_name: Generate News Videos triggered by first user in 2-hour cycle
actions: When any user accesses the Newslive agent, a unique conv_id is auto-generated for their session.
If no conv_id has been marked 'ready' in the last 2 hours, that user is the first user of the cycle and their conv_id becomes the source conv_id.
Fetch latest news content for 5 genres: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Weather.
Access teacher avatars via the Hevolve app and assign a unique avatar to each genre.
Generate narration scripts (~5 minutes) per genre.
Generate one video per genre using the assigned avatar and script.
Store videos under the source conv_id and set: Status: queued, Expiry: +2 hours.
Save metadata in memory for that conv_id: Genre → Avatar → Video link, Status: queued, Timestamp.
flows.sub_goal: Create a full set of pre-synthesized videos (one per genre) and store them under the first user's conv_id.

actions: Periodically scan for all conv_ids with status = queued.
For each queued conv_id, check video generation status using: https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}}.
If all 5 videos = success, update that conv_id to ready.
Save updated status and allow it to be used for delivery to all users.
flows.sub_goal: Mark a source conv_id as ready once all 5 genre videos are successfully generated.

flows.flow_name: Deliver Videos to Any User (Every User Access)
actions: When a user opens Newslive, a new conv_id is auto-generated for their session.
The system fetches the most recent conv_id with Status: ready and within the current 2-hour time window.
Retrieve 5 videos linked to that conv_id, each covering: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Weather.
Play all 5 videos to the user — each delivered by its respective teacher avatar.
Continue serving this video set to all users accessing Newslive until the 2-hour cycle ends.
flows.sub_goal: Deliver the latest pre-synthesized news video set to each user, using the source conv_id for the 2-hour window.
